Complete User Guide

SlimeWire

The degen trading terminal with a game built on top. This guide walks you through everything — the terminal, the Swamp game, raids, the Telegram bot, and sharing on X — in plain language.

slimewire.org · User Manual

SlimeWire is a Solana memecoin trading terminal — and a game. You can trade live coins, launch your own, hunt fresh launches, and play The Swamp, where real coins become creatures you catch and bosses you raid. This guide covers every feature you'll actually use. No technical setup, just how to navigate and what each thing does.

📖 What's inside

  1. Getting started
  2. The Terminal
  3. SlimeShield safety
  4. Trading & wallets
  5. Launching a coin
  6. The Swamp game
  7. Live Boss Raids
  8. Loop pages
  9. Telegram bot
  10. Sharing on X
  11. Tips & FAQ

🚀1. Getting Started

Open slimewire.org. You land on the connect screen with three ways in:

  • Connect Wallet — connect Phantom or Solflare to trade with your own wallet.
  • Create Account — make a SlimeWire account (email) to save settings, presets and managed wallets.
  • Browse Terminal — look around with no login. Great for scanning and playing the game before you commit.
Tip: You can play the whole Swamp game and browse the terminal without connecting anything. You only need a wallet when you want to actually buy, sell or launch.

🖥️2. The Terminal

The terminal is your command center. The left navigation is grouped into sections — here's what every tab does.

Terminal

TabWhat it does
Live TerminalYour main dashboard — live fresh pairs, best picks, KOL signals and quick trades in one view.
Home / ProfileYour account: profile image, X handle, referral code, and saved settings.
Smart ChartOpen any token's chart, links, transactions and trading context.
Slime SwapManual single-wallet swap with size presets — the fast buy/sell panel.

Market Intel

TabWhat it does
CooksScan fresh and trending pairs cooking right now.
Live TradesLive market activity and trade flow as it happens.
Slime ScopeScan fresh, graduating and graduated pump-style movement.
WatchlistCoins you've saved to track and their movement.
KOL TrackerWatch KOL wallets, public signals and copy-trade candidates.

Ogre Tools

TabWhat it does
Ogre TekThe automation deck — A.I. picking, SlimeBot, bundle, launch and snipe tools in one place.

Portfolio

TabWhat it does
Wallets / BalancesYour balances, managed wallets, restore, sweep and funding tools.
PositionsOpen holdings with manual exit controls.
PnLRealized and historical profit/loss cards.

Play

The nav also has 🎮 Play The Swamp and 🔥 Live Raids — your entry points to the game and the raid board.

🛡️3. SlimeShield Safety Read

Before you ape, SlimeWire gives every token a SlimeShield read — a quick verdict on whether a coin looks safe or risky. You'll see it on token pages and when you paste a contract address.

  • Verdict — a plain call (safe / risk / avoid) with the reasons behind it.
  • Signals — liquidity, momentum, sell pressure and common rug patterns checked automatically.
Always your call: the shield is a helper, not a guarantee. Memecoins are high risk — only spend what you can lose.

⚡4. Trading & Wallets

Buying & selling

  • Open a token (tap any coin, or paste its contract). Use Slime Swap or the token's Ape button.
  • Pick a size preset or type an amount, confirm, done. Your fill shows in Positions.
  • Exit any position manually from Positions, or set take-profit / stop-loss where available.

Wallets

  • Connected wallet — your own Phantom/Solflare.
  • Managed wallets — wallets SlimeWire creates for you (fund, sweep, restore) for faster trading and automation.
Never share your seed phrase. SlimeWire will never ask for it in chat.

🚀5. Launching a Coin

Launch your own coin from the terminal (Ogre Tek → Launch) or the /launch page. On SlimeWire a launch isn't just a page — your coin becomes content:

  • It appears on the Fresh Launch Radar and in the terminal feed.
  • It spawns as a boss on the Live Raids board and as a legendary creature in the Swamp.
  • It can fire Telegram alerts and generate share cards automatically.

🐸6. The Swamp Game

Open slimewire.org/swamp or tap Play The Swamp. It's free, runs in your browser, and is built on real live coins.

The basics

  • Move — drag anywhere on the left (mobile) or use WASD / arrow keys (desktop).
  • Pick your ogre on the title screen.
  • Live memecoins roam the swamp as wild creatures. Fresh launches are rare; SlimeWire launches are legendary.

Catching coins (your Dex)

  • Walk up to a creature and tap ✋ Catch. You'll see its real stats (market cap, age, momentum).
  • Weaken then catch: tap ⚔️ Weaken to lower its HP — the lower its HP, the higher your catch chance. Then time the throw bar and tap Throw.
  • Catches go in your Swampdex with a rarity. Your caught coins set your Swamp Worth (their performance since you caught them).
  • Slimeballs are your catch energy — they refill over time, and you can craft more from resources.

Fighting & resources

  • Hostile mobs (goblins, wolves, bears) roam too. Tap the ⚔️ Attack button to fight them.
  • Defeated mobs drop resources (wood, scrap, goo). Spend them at the Clan Camp to craft slimeballs and fortify your base.

Raid days, clans & survival

  • Raid Day window (Sat 2pm → Sun 2am UTC): more and tougher enemies. The rest of the week you build and gather. Watch the HUD countdown.
  • Clans — set a clan tag at the Clan Camp. Everyone with your tag forms a crew that competes together (see /crews).
  • Other traders walk the same map live — you'll see them around you.

Trade perks (never required)

The game is 100% free. Trading just rewards you: your real Swamp Worth buffs your damage and HP, catching feeds your Dex, and launching a coin earns a legendary. You never have to trade to play.

🔥7. Live Boss Raids

Open slimewire.org/raids. Every live launch is a boss with HP based on its bonding/market cap.

  • Ape / Chart — buy or view any boss instantly.
  • Join Raid — opens a pre-filled X post and scores you on the raid leaderboard. Rally your crew for more points.
  • Raid your own coin — paste any contract address (you don't need to have launched it on SlimeWire) and it goes on the board as a "Crew Raid" boss with real market data.
  • Top Raid Posts — X posts submitted via the Telegram /raid command, ranked by likes + retweets.

🧭8. Loop Pages

Standalone pages that make the swamp social and sticky:

📡 Radar /radar
Clean, fast scan of fresh launches — buckets like "Fresh under 5k", "Volume waking", "Bonding fast". One-tap Ape / Chart / Raid.
🗓️ Events /events
The degen event calendar — Boss Raid Night (live countdown), Fresh Launch Hour, catch contests, survival runs.
🪪 Profile /profile
Your swamp identity — catches, raid points, survival, badges and crew. Share your page on X.
🪪 Swamp Card /receipts
Generate a clean shareable card of your run (catches, Swamp Worth, raid points). Download & post it.
👥 Crews /crews
Telegram/X groups compete by clan tag. Everyone's catches + raids stack into the crew total.
🎒 Locker /locker
Cosmetics you unlock by playing — titles, badges and skins, with completion progress.
🔭 Watchtower /watchtower
What the swamp watches — most-raided coins, trending fresh, and your watchlist.
🎬 Coin Story /replay
Paste a contract to replay a coin's journey — born, liquidity, bonding, boss, catchable.

✈️9. Telegram Bot

Add the SlimeWire bot or DM it. In a group, an admin runs /slimewire on to arm live alerts. Commands anyone can use:

CommandWhat it does
/startOpen the menu / link your account.
/look <CA>SlimeShield read on a contract — verdict, chart and trade links. (In groups, just pasting a contract does this automatically.)
/alphaCurrent best picks / trending coins.
/apeThe freshest degen launches right now.
/raid <X link>Put your X raid post on the raid leaderboard, ranked by likes + retweets.
/proofThe public engine track record (wins and losses).
/kolsKOL / whale activity.
/receiptsLatest SlimeShield receipts.
/webJump to the web terminal.
/slimewire on|off(Group admins) arm or mute SlimeWire alerts in that group.

𝕏10. Sharing on X

SlimeWire turns your activity into shareable content — every share carries the site back to X:

  • Swamp Card (/receipts) — download your run card and post it.
  • Flex / Shill buttons — in the game and on coins, one tap opens a pre-filled post with the contract and links.
  • Join Raid — posts your raid for a coin and gets you on the raid board.
  • Profile — share your /profile page to show off your Dex and badges.

❓11. Tips & FAQ

Do I need a wallet to play the game?

No. The Swamp, raids and all loop pages are free with no login. A wallet is only for actually buying, selling or launching.

How do I get on a leaderboard?

Set a tag (in the game and on /raids). Catches feed the catch board, raids feed the raid board, survival feeds the survival board, and your clan tag feeds the crews board.

How do I bring my group in?

Pick a clan tag, have your Telegram/X group all set the same tag, and grind together on the /crews board.

Is the SlimeShield read a guarantee?

No — it's a fast safety helper. Memecoins are risky; only spend what you can afford to lose.

Fastest loop: scan /radar → ape or raid a coin → catch it in the /swamp → post your /receipts card → bring your crew via /crews.
SlimeWire · slimewire.org · Complete User Guide · Play free, trade when you're ready.
